description: Style NotePared down to the basics, this tunic from alma is just right for a layered boho chic or a simple off-to-college vibe. Add a splash of colourful jewellery for an interesting dimension. The simple silhouette and the minimal design details will balance the brighter accessories.Product DetailsWhite tunic with a mandarin collar and a V-neckline, chest fabric buttoned placket, three fourth sleeves, pintucks on the front, pin tucks from the yoke at the bach and a curved hemMaterial and CareBlended cottonMachine washWash dark colours separatelyDry in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
